text: On the inside of the RV we see a bed and a closet.
A cattle is hiding under a bridge being alone.
A grey jet plane on display in a warehouse.
A restaurant kitchen with bowls and pans ready for the night.
A young child is wearing a helmet, attempting to hit a softball.
a cat looks at its reflection in the mirror
The baseball player is ready to hit the ball.
Two elephants are pictured with several people on them.
A male tennis player swinging back his tennis racket.
A computer with a cell phone resting against the monitor.
